examples: She hung up without saying goodbye.
They hung up decorations for the party.
She hung up the wet clothes to dry.
He hung up his hat on the hook.
Don't hang up! I have more to say.
He hung up on me in the middle of the conversation.
They hung up after saying goodnight.
I'll hang up now and call you back.
Hang up your coat in the closet.
Please hang up your towel after use.
example_translate: Не вешай трубку! Мне ещё есть что сказать.
Я сейчас повешу трубку и перезвоню.
hang up.synonyms:
Вешать трубку (завершать звонок) - end the call, put down the phone
Вешать (одежду, предметы) - suspend, put up
